Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Ancestral Solitude
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +11% (augmented)
Pack Size: +24% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +18% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +13% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +100% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Impacting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 93(90-100)% increased Stun Buildup
{ Prefix Modifier "Destructive" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 239(200-240)% increased Critical Hit Chance
Monsters have +25(21-25)% Critical Damage Bonus
{ Prefix Modifier "Fleeting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 12(10-15)% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed
{ Suffix Modifier "of Overpowering" (Tier: 1) }
Monster have 111(100-119)% increased Elemental Ailment Application
{ Suffix Modifier "of Enduring" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters are Armoured
{ Suffix Modifier "of Evasion" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters are Evasive
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
